feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: why arent we getting any good superhero games? you would think ever since the mo…
entry.content: why arent we getting any good superhero games? you would think ever since the movies caught fire there would be more games but its mostly been batman, spiderman, and assorted flops. the movie craze came and went and lasted like 15 years and in those 15 years vidya never took advantage of the popularity of the superhero/comic book genre being more popular than it ever was
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: This operating systems and the App Store represent the gold standard in simple, …
entry.content: This operating systems and the App Store represent the gold standard in simple, straightforward Unix-like computing. Your hobby DE + kernel / repo *ack* distro frankenOS just can't compete.

entry.title: /b/ Random: my old self doesn't exist anymore...like I'm literally not that person anymore, …
entry.content: my old self doesn't exist anymore...like I'm literally not that person anymore, it's like i was never even born...this is very strange, i feel fine, but something just seems a bit "off"...is this some dream my old self is having? seems too good to be true, to be divorced from all the pains and sufferings of my old self, and i am now some different person who has never known extreme suffering...maybe my old self "passed the baton" to me? like, he went as far as he could possibly go on his own, an
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.content: Did you know Japanese people are perfectly FINE with their restaurants charging foreign-looking people double and triple the actual price? (a very serious crime outside Asian shitholes) https://x.com/IDrawReetards/status/ 2076393539198742540 I now declare all anime and manga to be free forever. Enjoy, it's all yours.

entry.title: /int/ International: /int/ confessions
entry.content: When I was a kid I'd spent a fair amount of my weekends at my grandparent's farm and who happened to have a neighbor who owned a shitbull that'd always chase and try to bite me. Well, this one weekend my granddad was bitching at me to change out the frames in the beehives in the beehive since they were filled with honey on the edge of our property and something I fucking hated doing since I'd always managed to get stung. Anyway, the fucking faggot mutt ran up to the fence and starting chimping o
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: amazing
entry.content: if you do not sleep for ~7 days straight, they say you'll go crazy. but many, many people misunderstand why! it makes you realize that from infancy to adulthood, there were never any breaks or "phases". sleep is the only thing that splits the days. if you could somehow stay awake from birth to 80 years old... your life wouldn't feel very profound.
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /pmdt/ - Pokemon Mystery Dungeon Trash General #113
entry.content: Sharpedo Bluff Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83920015/ Welcome to /pmdt/! A thread for posting art, writing, and discussing of the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon Series! Especially if it's saucy~ You can post art, recommend comics or fanfics, talk about the games/setting, or just roll to see what Pokémon you wake up as! If you'd like to join in the RP, the Lore Archive gives a general summary of the setting and history so far! We have a shared setting for the thread if you wish
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PCIE WIFI 7 BT 5.4 card that works with intel (and linux)?
entry.content: Hey frens does anyone know for sure what wifi 7 bt 4 pcie card works with AMD/linux. AI is fucking useless for this i wasted my entire day running in circles, turns out most of them only work with intel/win11.. In the end the one most likelyu to work is >MSI HERALD MAX BE Wi-Fi 7 MAX Wireless BT 5.4 QCNCM865 Has anyone tested it? Thanks...
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ive been living with rock music for so long... and honestly the genre just feels…
entry.content: ive been living with rock music for so long... and honestly the genre just feels so stale to me now. maybe im the problem but it kinda feels like its been running in circles for years and i kept waiting for something to pull me back in... i think i will descend from my self-imposed cave and finally listen to all the hyperpop and revival stuff i kept pretending i would get around to someday... i used to foolishly think i had already missed the moment and that there was no point trying to catch up
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Linux 5,59% desktop marketshare in June. Plus Chrome OS in June at 1,54%, that's…

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Dodge Ram 4500 w Cummins ISB 6.7
entry.content: >Truck was apparently having some starter solenoid relay issues. (Wasn’t my job to fix at the time) >Another mechanic had taught the driver how to internally close the relay to turn over the truck Well today he goes to the oil changers and they swap his filters. The truck started up then fell flat on its face after idling for a moment. I’m very familiar with the priming procedure and figured either bad filter swap or bad priming job. When I got down there I had no crank no start at the key. I co
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3000
entry.content: >It's Over 3000! Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84061791/ >Scripts to check image metadata: re

Post about your hatred for Brock, why you hate Brock, speculate or make declarative statements about Brock's sexuality (gay), make fun of Brock, tell stories about Brock, make up stories about Brock. Assess Brock's station in life relative to his age. Feel free to discuss or make fun of Brock elsewhere, if the mood strikes you, or if you encounter Brock acting gay (100% of his waking hours). However, we can use
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I literally just realized that the reason that this feels so wrong is because it…
entry.content: I literally just realized that the reason that this feels so wrong is because it feels like a third party knockoff of Avatar instead of a continuation. The introduction of all new characters and elements which are just repeats of things from the previous show reads literally like someone in a boardroom got a bunch of people together and said "alright, I need you to magic me up a new IP like that popular Avatar show. What do you got?"
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: Thoughts on the Italian Co-belligerent Army in your country?
entry.content: 1. Your country 2. What are your thoughts on the Italian Co-belligerent Army? United States I think it's super interesting and underappreciated. Italians are generally just thought of as a lesser Axis member in WWII but thousands were killed fighting for the Allies and nobody remembers it. The initial engagements in particular are really tragic since Italian units were torn based on allegiance and surrounded and outnumbered by Germans. >Why post this on /int/ instead of /his/? I genuinely want t
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: after getting expelled from school for wearing a bikini and leather jacket and s…
entry.content: after getting expelled from school for wearing a bikini and leather jacket and slamming my switchblade into my school desk I've been in kind of a weird place I don't really know how I should feel anymore why is school so fake stupid and gay? I had my knife confiscated and I was handcuffed by security and thrown out. I started thinking about knife fighting a lot, why do they always show switchblades in the movies? I was thinking if I ever get into a knife fight, I'm going to get a big hunting kni
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Auto shop manager here. I assure you that even an old clunker car is by far a mu…
entry.content: Auto shop manager here. I assure you that even an old clunker car is by far a much better investment than a brand new car. These new cars are becoming almost impossible for anyone to fix. I even had to pay one of my employees to get an associates degree in electrical engineering technology just to work on new bmw i3s. I literally had to retire early because I can't take this EV craze anymore. I swear to God sooner or later nobody will know how to fix cars anymore
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The f…
entry.content: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The first time, when I was 14, I had to smoke five joints in a row before I felt anything. Other times, I tried smoking as many as three joints in a row and felt nothing. The high when I was 14 was sort of like everything slowing down drastically, and the thought of "passing out high" kept repeating in my head. On Thursday, almost 20 years later, I got high on THC again, but this was definitely a very different experience
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

Orcs, goblins, femboys, futa, demons, and similar themes are fine too. Reverse NTR and Lesbian NTR is fine

entry.title: /g/ Technology: So why does it take my modern, 32 core + 128GB DDR5 Ram + 4090 computer literal …
entry.content: So why does it take my modern, 32 core + 128GB DDR5 Ram + 4090 computer literal seconds to perform a trivial operation such as resizing an image to be under 4MB so i can post it to this fucking website? The code is written in Rust even. It's absolutely something systemic too because convert on debian is slow as balls as well taking several seconds to convert a simple image I expect a modern system to be able to resize hundreds of images per second. Am i crazy?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Mobility scooter tech?
entry.content: Just blew out my right knee. I weigh 600 lbs. Time to get a scooter. What's the best tech? Any of these things run Linux?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: >Wake up at 4PM from napsy time >Glance over at my Good Boy Points scoreboard >F…
entry.content: >Wake up at 4PM from napsy time >Glance over at my Good Boy Points scoreboard >Fuck yes, 25 pointsies! >Time to play some video gameys >Waddle downstairs to living room in my jammy wammies >Mom has her book club over, occupying valuable living room space >"Anon, we're having our weekly book meeting here, can't you go play in the playroom for a little while?" >No bitch, I saved up my Good Boy Points to play my Weegee game >"O-okay, Anon, but please try to keep it down." >Of course mommy, I'm your
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: I really hate the United States. I have an almost bloodthirsty hatred for toward…
entry.content: I really hate the United States. I have an almost bloodthirsty hatred for towards their state. I will celebrate when they collapse.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How is game development affected by AI?
entry.content: Any game dev/working in the game industry here? Tell us how does ai affect it. Are steam, Google play, apple play drowned in ai slop? I guess literally anyone can slop out a game with Claude these days.
